name: council
description: Convene a council of agency-agents specialists on one decision with nothing written yet. One seat per named viewpoint gap (no upper limit); each gives an independent blind position; the main agent only aggregates and adjudicates facts. Facts close only by stating the decision criterion before running the command and pasting the verbatim output; judgment calls go to the human /grilling-style, one question at a time with a recommended answer; everything else is argued out in rounds. Before any verdict a mandatory auditor in a fresh context re-runs the commands and checks the citations. Self-driving — no external harness needed. Requires the agency-agents catalog.
